name: Over-Door Hook
desc:
Material: Carbon steel+nanmu
Size: 380x95x315 mm
Color: White/Grey
subDesc: The space behind doors is often overlooked, yet it holds great storage potential. This over-door hook installs without drilling—simply hang it over the door to instantly create extra storage. Towels, clothes, bags, or everyday essentials can beneatly hung without taking up floor space. Place it behind bedroom doors, bathroom doors, or entryway doors to add convenience and order to your daily routines, making storage effortless and discreet.
